name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Perdue?=
subject: Joni Ernst On The Trail In Georgia: We Must Hold The Line
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/504b1144f6f3/watch-senator-david-perdue-on-fox-news-georgia-is-the-last-line-of-defense-66375?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
| _**Joni Ernst On The Trail In Georgia:
We Must Hold The Line**_
Folks -

We had a good friend on the road today! Iowa Senator Joni Ernst joined Senator David Perdue for a campaign bus tour stop in Spalding County.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **JONI ERNST→ **

_“I am on the campaign trail today with my dear friend, David Perdue, defender of all that is good and right in America and the men and women who defend her... There is more at risk than just two simple seats in the United States Senate. There is a lot at risk right now in the United States if we do not hold the Senate and keep it red... While the Left and the opponents of David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler are busy trying to defund the police, David is defending the police.” _

**Fox News covered her visit tonight on _Special Report._ Click [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=174b3917e9&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch.**
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=586bd4ff59&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **DAVID PERDUE → **

_“No way did Bonnie and I see today happening, where we would be in the breach where our seats, Kelly’s and mine, will determine the direction of our country for the next 50 to 100 years. That’s the turning point that we are potentially at right now. I only have to use their words: Chuck Schumer has said, ‘We take Georgia, we change America.’ We’re never going to let that happen.”_

**DONALD TRUMP JR. → **

Donald Trump Jr. [knows what’s at stake](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=ab03a82c9a&e=02cd889ad3) in this election, and he wants you to VOTE for David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler.
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=02dd082513&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **[GeorgiaPol:](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a8fd3f5b84&e=02cd889ad3) US Senators Perdue And Loeffler Support President Trump’s Recount Request**
_Georgia’s election was certified on Friday. Not long after that, the Trump campaign made it known that they were planning to request a recount. Both of Georgia’s US Senators have expressed support of the Trump campaign’s request.

>From Senator David Perdue’s office:

“I support President Trump’s request for a recount in Georgia, one in which signatures on absentee ballot envelopes are properly matched and verified to their signature on the registration. Anything less than that will not be a full and transparent recount. I have spoken to President Trump several times in the last week about this, and as I have said from the beginning: every legal vote cast, should be counted. Any illegal vote shouldn’t. Georgians deserve full transparency and uniformity in the counting process.”_

**BERNIE SANDERS ENDORSES OSSOFF → **

This weekend, for the second time in his political career, Jon Ossoff has [earned the endorsement ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=af923bc1b4&e=02cd889ad3)of socialist Senator Bernie Sanders, who tweeted his support for Ossoff and his running mate Raphael Warnock.

Sanders, who also endorsed Ossoff for his failed 2017 congressional campaign, is one of the nation’s most radical politicians. He supports the elimination of private health insurance, defunding the police, the Green New Deal, and a litany or other dangerous policies.

**MARSHA BLACKBURN → **

Today, Senator Marsha Blackburn [wrote an op-ed](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=9e70acb6ec&e=02cd889ad3) for Breitbart about the importance of keeping the Senate majority.

_If elected, radical Raphael Warnock and socialist trust-fund Jon Ossoff will stand with Chuck Schumer, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-NY) and fully support their socialist agenda._
...
_Neither Georgia nor the United States can afford Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff becoming Senators. We must hold the line. And to do so, we need everyone to get involved either through donating or volunteering.
...
Sens. Kelly Loeffler (R-GA) and David Perdue (R-GA) are political outsiders who have spent their lives building businesses. They will continue to fight to preserve the American dream, stand for freedom and protect our God-given rights like the Second Amendment. They are standing with President Trump on the frontlines to protect the soul of America.

Join me and help support President Trump, Kelly Loeffler, and David Perdue — our country depends on it. _

**You heard Senator Blackburn - we need your help. Please, chip in[ here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=cad41d67a6&e=02cd889ad3).

PLUS -- Facebook has banned us from advertising. Help us get our message out by passing this along to your friends and family. **
###

---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=431f2719db&e=02cd889ad3 "DONATE NOW!")
---
| [VOLUNTEER](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=47a9c198df&e=02cd889ad3 "VOLUNTEER")
---
| | _Join us at PerdueSenate.com and make this the largest grassroots effort in Georgia history to re-elect Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler._
---

---

clean_body: I'm asking for your help The fate of Georgia is in your hands ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Peter, I'll cut right to the chase. As of now, Chuck Schumer thinks that he can WIN in Georgia, defeating Republican David Perdue. He's already RAISED millions in order to hijack this seat, which is why I had no choice but to reach out today. In order to DEFEND David Perdue's seat and PROTECT our Republican Senate Majority I need our TOP SUPPORTERS to step up TODAY. If Democrats FLIP David's seat, turning the Senate BLUE in the process, they'll do whatever it takes to PACK the Supreme Court, RAISE your taxes, and IMPLEMENT the Green New Deal. Peter, can I count on you to rush an urgent $150, $50, or $35 contribution to put a stop to this before it's too late? Through MIDNIGHT TONIGHT all gifts made to support Republican David Perdue will have 5X THE IMPACT. EMERGENCY 5X MATCH TO STAND WITH DAVID PERDUE RUSH DONATE HERE A conservative outsider and proven job creator, David Perdue is one of the strongest defenders of our agenda in the Senate, which is why we can't afford to lose him, Peter. Remember, ALL DONATIONS made through midnight tonight will have 5X THE IMPACT in our fight to STAND with David, STOP Chuck Schumer, and PROTECT our Senate Majority. Thank you, Mitch McConnell Paid for by Perdue for Senate

subject: The most radical and dangerous candidate in America

body:
The radical left is trying its best to take over the Senate and our country. Ground Zero for their effort is right here in Georgia. We cannot let them win. Can you help me defeat him and save the Republican Senate Majority?
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56917034:sSy8ozKSN:m:1:2247059263:07199C90D6DB3EA06730340AE3868330:r)

Peter,

My opponent is the most radical and dangerous candidate in America. If he wins this Senate runoff, the Democrats will have all the votes they need to impose an extreme socialist agenda on our country.

[**Can you help me defeat him and save the Republican Senate Majority?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56917034:sSy8ozKSN:m:1:2247059263:07199C90D6DB3EA06730340AE3868330:r)****

---
**
My opponent has a history of supporting the Communist dictator Fidel Castro, praising Marxism, and he compares our brave police officers to "gangsters" and "thugs." **

Someone like him has no business representing the great state of Georgia in the Senate. He would give the radicals total control. We cannot let him and the Democrats win.

**In contrast, I am proud to be an American. I will defend your conservative values and stand up to the radical left extremists in the Democrat Party.**

That's why I'm fighting so hard in this Senate runoff. [**I would truly appreciate your prayers and any amount you could give to help our campaign.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56917034:sSy8ozKSN:m:1:2247059263:07199C90D6DB3EA06730340AE3868330:r)

The radical left is trying its best to take over the Senate and our country. Ground Zero for their effort is right here in Georgia. We cannot let them win.

**Save the Senate. Save America. HOLD THE LINE.**

Kelly Loeffler

_****_
[**6X MATCH NOW**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56917034:sSy8ozKSN:m:1:2247059263:07199C90D6DB3EA06730340AE3868330:r)
---

Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
---

A couple may contribute up to $11,200 ($5,600 for the general and $5,600 designated for a potential general run-off election) if drawn on a joint account and if this form is completed and signed by both contributors.

| [Jersey Deserves Justice - Contribute Now to Help](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=ad92adcc54&e=3e017fab0f "Jersey Deserves Justice - Contribute Now to Help")
---
| | **Hirsh Singh comes down strongly on Chris Christie's attack on Trump**
Gubernatorial candidate Hirsh Singh, who has vowed to overhaul the election system in New Jersey and make it more transparent, has come down strongly on the attack by former Governor Chris Christie against President Trump over the weekend. Christie wanted Trump to end the lawsuits opposing election fraud and called his legal team a national embarrassment.

"It is Chris Christie who is a national embarrassment," said Singh. "The New Jersey swamp creatures who have been pretending to be pro-America have shown their true colors and have attacked President Trump when he needs our support the most as he takes on the perpetrators of electoral fraud. Christie is angling to run for President in 2024, and in his cynical calculations, it would be better if Trump is completely out of the way and a Democrat administration in power before his run. He couldn't care less that it will be the end of our Republic," added Singh.

Christie as well as his lieutenants have been complicit with those perpetrating this fraud. Christie's right hand man and RNC member, Bill Palatucci, has also attacked Trump for highlighting the fraud committed through mail-in ballots and claimed Trump's opposition to the fraud through mail-in ballots would "undermine our sacred democracy." Another candidate for next year's election, Jack Ciaterelli has called Trump a 'charlatan' while Jon Bramnick, the Republican leader in the state Assembly, has termed Trump's efforts as "dangerous to our democracy."

These are members of the same establishment that had opposed Trump in 2016 and attempted a coup by trying to replace Trump with John Kasich as the GOP nominee for President. "It is ironic that they speak of democracy," pointed out Singh. The centerpiece of Singh's gubernatorial campaign is to fix the electoral system in New Jersey as he himself was the victim of electoral fraud during the 2020 US Senate primary election. Every single type of fraud that Singh experienced has been used against President Trump as well. Singh also has a lawsuit that reached the US Supreme Court in October this year and with arguments nearly identical to those in the lawsuits filed later by President Trump's teams. In both the case of Singh and President Trump, the NJ GOP and their most experienced operatives have been in cahoots with the Democrats in making the fraud a systemic feature of our election system.

The New Jersey establishment had set up a Democrat named Rik Mehta in the 2020 US Senate primary election to oppose Singh and rigged the primary in Mehta's favor. They then joined the Democrats in opposing election transparency despite evidence of massive fraud. As a result of Mehta's Senate candidacy, the Republican Party in New Jersey has nearly been wiped out. Before Christie became Governor, New Jersey had six Republican Congressional seats. After his embarrassing stint as Governor New Jersey, has been reduced to just two Republican Congressional seats; and even those two were due to the momentum provided by President Trump in the districts of Jeff Van Drew and Chris Smith.

Hirsh Singh is determined to drain the New Jersey swamp.

Join the fight to save New Jersey at HirshSingh.com

clean_body: "It is Chris Christie who is a national embarrassment... | | | | | | | | November 23, 2020 FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Contact: mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release | | Hirsh Singh comes down strongly on Chris Christie's attack on Trump | | "Jersey Deserves Justice - Contribute Now to Help" | | Hirsh Singh comes down strongly on Chris Christie's attack on Trump Gubernatorial candidate Hirsh Singh, who has vowed to overhaul the election system in New Jersey and make it more transparent, has come down strongly on the attack by former Governor Chris Christie against President Trump over the weekend. Christie wanted Trump to end the lawsuits opposing election fraud and called his legal team a national embarrassment. "It is Chris Christie who is a national embarrassment," said Singh. "The New Jersey swamp creatures who have been pretending to be pro-America have shown their true colors and have attacked President Trump when he needs our support the most as he takes on the perpetrators of electoral fraud. Christie is angling to run for President in 2024, and in his cynical calculations, it would be better if Trump is completely out of the way and a Democrat administration in power before his run. He couldn't care less that it will be the end of our Republic," added Singh. Christie as well as his lieutenants have been complicit with those perpetrating this fraud. Christie's right hand man and RNC member, Bill Palatucci, has also attacked Trump for highlighting the fraud committed through mail-in ballots and claimed Trump's opposition to the fraud through mail-in ballots would "undermine our sacred democracy." Another candidate for next year's election, Jack Ciaterelli has called Trump a 'charlatan' while Jon Bramnick, the Republican leader in the state Assembly, has termed Trump's efforts as "dangerous to our democracy." These are members of the same establishment that had opposed Trump in 2016 and attempted a coup by trying to replace Trump with John Kasich as the GOP nominee for President. "It is ironic that they speak of democracy," pointed out Singh. The centerpiece of Singh's gubernatorial campaign is to fix the electoral system in New Jersey as he himself was the victim of electoral fraud during the 2020 US Senate primary election. Every single type of fraud that Singh experienced has been used against President Trump as well. Singh also has a lawsuit that reached the US Supreme Court in October this year and with arguments nearly identical to those in the lawsuits filed later by President Trump's teams. In both the case of Singh and President Trump, the NJ GOP and their most experienced operatives have been in cahoots with the Democrats in making the fraud a systemic feature of our election system. The New Jersey establishment had set up a Democrat named Rik Mehta in the 2020 US Senate primary election to oppose Singh and rigged the primary in Mehta's favor. They then joined the Democrats in opposing election transparency despite evidence of massive fraud. As a result of Mehta's Senate candidacy, the Republican Party in New Jersey has nearly been wiped out. Before Christie became Governor, New Jersey had six Republican Congressional seats. After his embarrassing stint as Governor New Jersey, has been reduced to just two Republican Congressional seats; and even those two were due to the momentum provided by President Trump in the districts of Jeff Van Drew and Chris Smith. Hirsh Singh is determined to drain the New Jersey swamp. Join the fight to save New Jersey at HirshSingh.com | "Jersey Deserves Justice - Contribute Now to Help" | ### For any inquiries, please reply to this message or send an email to: mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release Additional information is available on our and page. Thank you, The Singh for Governor Press Team NEW JERSEY DESERVES JUSTICE For the People | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 and 2021 Singh for Governor , All rights reserved. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Perdue for Senate
body:
and the stakes couldn't be higher.

Dear Friend, we're heading into overtime, and **it 's vital that we carry David Perdue into victory. **

Senator David Perdue's race against radical Leftist Jon Ossoff is now in a _**RUNOFF**_.

We've fought long and hard throughout this race, but it isn't over yet. We have until January 5th to take our team into the end zone so that we can secure the future of not only Georgia but also, the United States Senate.

It's no secret that the Left has made our state the focal point for their playbook as they attempt to take down Senator David Perdue and his proven America-First agenda.

To keep Team Perdue moving downfield, please rush:

| Peter,
Control of the US Senate will come down to the two runoff elections in Georgia. With a Democrat majority in the House and Joe Biden headed toward the Oval Office, the Senate will be our last line of defense against a complete Democrat takeover.
We can't let the Democrats take a supermajority. I am going to fight to the end to save our country from the dangerous policies set forth by the Democrat Party, but it's going to take the efforts of Patriots like you!

body:
🚨 Help save the Senate & save America!
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/4f26da48a9f7ea20/a71e468dca24d6a8c3d6b838967d376c/32613) Hey Fellow Conservative, Thank you, again, for all your support throughout this historic 2020 election cycle. We scored big wins here in Alabama... and now, [**we need to rush CRITICAL support to the frontline battle for control of the U.S. Senate in Georgia**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/4f26da48a9f7ea20/e4bebcf332cc4a6cc3d6b838967d376c/32613). As you likely know it’s 50-48 right now in our favor, with Georgia’s two races headed to runoff elections on January 5th. We MUST protect these seats to protect our majority. If we lose these races, and Joe Biden is sworn in as our next president, we’ll face **COMPLETE DEMOCRAT CONTROL** in Washington. It’s all hands on deck in Georgia, Fellow Conservative. Senator David Perdue and Senator Kelly Loeffler are both locked in DEAD HEAT races – they need all the support we can send their way! **[🚨 Rush a $5, $15, $30, $50, or $100 contribution, and we’ll](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/4f26da48a9f7ea20/bbbe8bd385eecf5fc3d6b838967d376c/32613)**
**[split it three ways to fuel the fight for victory in Georgia](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/4f26da48a9f7ea20/cd2085e301ded5e8c3d6b838967d376c/32613)**. Under a 50-50 U.S. Senate, with Joe Biden in the White House, Kamala Harris would hold the tie-breaking vote to advance their radical agenda. **There would be NOTHING to stop their agenda to _pack the U.S. Supreme Court_ , _raise our taxes_ , _take our guns_ , _gran_ _t amnesty to illegal immigrants_ , and on and on!** Please pitch in what you can. The Democrats are spending millions every day now to win these races in Georgia. Senator Perdue and Senator Loeffler need every grassroots conservative on board to SAVE THE SENATE and SAVE AMERICA. **[Follow this link to make a secure online donation](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/4f26da48a9f7ea20/7344d401a135d1fbc3d6b838967d376c/32613)**. \- Team Carl [**PITCH IN $5 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/4f26da48a9f7ea20/0a83151e62671d9ac3d6b838967d376c/32613) [**PITCH IN $15 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/4f26da48a9f7ea20/b89ac31cfda0b99ac3d6b838967d376c/32613) [**PITCH IN $30 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/4f26da48a9f7ea20/7e897ee7d7399277c3d6b838967d376c/32613) [**PITCH IN $50 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/4f26da48a9f7ea20/0ed8000ef13c1663c3d6b838967d376c/32613) [**PITCH IN $100 >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/4f26da48a9f7ea20/662093095133baa0c3d6b838967d376c/32613) [**PITCH IN ANOTHER AMOUNT >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/4f26da48a9f7ea20/7f7c88c1425b0c1dc3d6b838967d376c/32613) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/4f26da48a9f7ea20/4cae1ba837a64648c3d6b838967d376c/32613) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/4f26da48a9f7ea20/21f5bc079625c951c3d6b838967d376c/32613)

It’s all hands on deck in Georgia, Fellow Conservative. Senator David Perdue and Senator Kelly Loeffler are both locked in DEAD HEAT races – they need all the support we can send their way! . Under a 50-50 U.S. Senate, with Joe Biden in the White House, Kamala Harris would hold the tie-breaking vote to advance their radical agenda. There would be NOTHING to stop their agenda to pack the U.S. Supreme Court , raise our taxes , take our guns , gran t amnesty to illegal immigrants , and on and on! Please pitch in what you can. The Democrats are spending millions every day now to win these races in Georgia. Senator Perdue and Senator Loeffler need every grassroots conservative on board to SAVE THE SENATE and SAVE AMERICA. . \- Team Carl | | | ---|--- To ensure you receive our emails, please add votecarl@jerrycarlupdates.com to your safe senders list or address book! id:2020-11-17-15:19:00:496t Paid for by Jerry Carl for Congress

name: Mike Huckabee
subject: Heads up. Coming your way…
body:
| | Peter, Next Tuesday, December 1, is a big day. It’s Giving Tuesday, and nonprofits from across the country will be asking for support. Let me tell you what My Faith Votes is planning, and why it matters to you. First off, we’ve set a fundraising goal of $100,000, set to include a matching grant of $50,000.
We believe we can do this, and that generous donors are stepping up with offers of grants because we are the most effective national organization mobilizing Christians to vote.
Voting may seem like a simple thing, but historically one in four Christians do not vote. Yet we wonder why our government has so often overlooked, or been outright hostile to our values.
While it’s a tough thing to hear that the fault lies with us, the good news is that the solution lies with us as well.
2020 was a huge election that will have major consequences for the future. And while the race for the White House continues to play out, the race for the U.S. Senate has been simplified greatly -- it all comes down to the two Georgia runoff elections on January 5. And, rather than being spread across ten or more states, we’re able to hone our focus and mass our resources. A big day next week will greatly strengthen our hand in Georgia, and set the stage for all the fights that will inevitably arise next year. [While you’re of course welcome to start early](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201201apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201124apl01nd&n=1), I hope you’ll help us to make Giving Tuesday next week an historic day. [](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201201apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201124apl01nd&n=2) As always, thank you for your commitment to help Christians pray, think biblically and vote.

Sincerely,
**** Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201124apl01nd&n=3)

It's chilling to see Trump recklessly refuse to accept his loss to President-elect Biden by throwing around wild and baseless claims of voter fraud in a desperate attempt to hold on to power. **Even worse, Trump is being enabled by Minnesota Republicans who are failing to speak out against his actions.** This is what we're up against: a radicalized Republican party that won't stand up for the very basics of our democracy. name: Bettina Weiss
subject: just how competitive this race was
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/48JhYk8ac7cfQFn-O0hwiNaEx5f-eFV_oBwZLVAAFdw=/IeLOL70ru24gf83Q18NDr0VPBSDc-cmPAnznFHcs8Vo=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201124-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

The final results of the election have now been certified, and with a win margin of **[just 1.8%,](https://act.myngp.com/el/48JhYk8ac7cfQFn-O0hwiNaEx5f-eFV_oBwZLVAAFdw=/IeLOL70ru24gf83Q18NDr0VPBSDc-cmPAnznFHcs8Vo=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201124-1-EM&amount=25)** our race was the **8t****[h tightest House race in the entire country.](https://act.myngp.com/el/48JhYk8ac7cfQFn-O0hwiNaEx5f-eFV_oBwZLVAAFdw=/IeLOL70ru24gf83Q18NDr0VPBSDc-cmPAnznFHcs8Vo=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201124-1-EM&amount=25)**

We always knew it was going to be a close race - VA-07 had gone for Trump by 7 points in the last presidential election, after all.

Here's how we won: we ran a strategic and aggressive voter outreach program. And the hard work paid off -**[with over 78%, our district had the _highest voter turnout_ of all congressional districts in Virginia this year!](https://act.myngp.com/el/48JhYk8ac7cfQFn-O0hwiNaEx5f-eFV_oBwZLVAAFdw=/IeLOL70ru24gf83Q18NDr0VPBSDc-cmPAnznFHcs8Vo=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201124-1-EM&amount=25)**
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/48JhYk8ac7cfQFn-O0hwiNaEx5f-eFV_oBwZLVAAFdw=/IeLOL70ru24gf83Q18NDr0VPBSDc-cmPAnznFHcs8Vo=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201124-1-EM&amount=25)
Throughout this campaign, we told you that we weren't taking anything for granted. Every postcard we wrote, every sign we delivered, and the tens of thousands of phone calls we made each made a huge difference.

We used social media and digital marketing in new and innovative ways to communicate about expanded early voting opportunities and to encourage residents to make a plan to vote. We ran positive, issue-based ads on television to talk about Abigail's record of hard work for the people of Central Virginia.

Here's another way to look at our success: **[we had the second-highest improvement in turnout from 2016 in all of Virginia.](https://act.myngp.com/el/48JhYk8ac7cfQFn-O0hwiNaEx5f-eFV_oBwZLVAAFdw=/IeLOL70ru24gf83Q18NDr0VPBSDc-cmPAnznFHcs8Vo=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201124-1-EM&amount=25)** This positive shift in turnout is hard, on-paper evidence of the way that this team was able to urgently and effectively mobilize voters this year.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/48JhYk8ac7cfQFn-O0hwiNaEx5f-eFV_oBwZLVAAFdw=/IeLOL70ru24gf83Q18NDr0VPBSDc-cmPAnznFHcs8Vo=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201124-1-EM&amount=25)
Thank you for believing in our people-focused campaign and supporting our work. We look forward to building on our organizing and outreach in this Central Virginia community in the years to come. With a phenomenal candidate like Abigail at our helm, we can continue to make history.

Thank you,

_Bettina
Campaign Manager_
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/48JhYk8ac7cfQFn-O0hwiNaEx5f-eFV_oBwZLVAAFdw=/IeLOL70ru24gf83Q18NDr0VPBSDc-cmPAnznFHcs8Vo=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201124-1-EM&amount=25)

She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit =. | If you wish to receive fewer emails, =. =

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Challenges to the Rule of Law
body:
We will continue to blaze new trails as America's preeminent government watchdog group, and that we will continue to perform the all-important work of fighting against public corruption and for the rule of law

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch is defending the principle that "no one is above the law" with greater impact than ever before in our 26-year history.
And **_[with your support](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52120&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMjQxNTI4NDQ=)_** , we will continue to blaze new trails as America's preeminent government watchdog group and perform the all-important work of fighting _against_ public corruption and _for_ the rule of law.
Without a doubt, America needs Judicial Watch as much as we need you:
* _To be the most effective force in America_**battling successfully in courtrooms****across America for honest elections**. We do the job that the U.S. Department of Justice fails to do with legal actions that have led states (including **California** , **Indiana** , **Kentucky** and **Ohio)** to take concrete steps to clean their voter rolls. And as I write to you today, we are still pursuing lawsuits against **North Carolina** and **Pennsylvania** over their failure to follow federal election law.

* _To be the most effective force in America_**leading the fight _for_ federal immigration law enforcement and _against_ illegal sanctuary policies. **We are now preparing for trial in our historic challenge to **San Francisco '**s deadly sanctuary policy, and we are pursuing another lawsuit challenging a similar policy in California's **Santa Clara County** (San Jose).

* _To be the most effective force in America_**uncovering the truth about the****Deep State conspiracy to take down President Trump** and his administration! We are forcing the release of government documents showing how senior officials in the Obama State Department, FBI and Department of Justice corruptly pursued a corrupt investigation into Trump and his team, while working to cover up Hillary Clinton's crimes. _You can rest assured that these investigations and lawsuits will continue, whatever the result of the 2020 elections_!

As I write you today, our investigators are hard at work filing Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests to and lawsuits against government agencies on new fronts in our election integrity, illegal immigration/sanctuary policies and Deep State litigation. **That 's why I hope you will join our fight by _[making you best tax-deductible contribution](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52120&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMjQxNTI4NDQ=)_ to Judicial Watch right now**.
**_[With your support](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52120&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMjQxNTI4NDQ=)_** we will keep fighting effectively **_for_** fair and honest elections, **_for_** the rule of law (including our laws against illegal immigration), and **_against_** corruption and cover-ups of unethical politicians in both parties and politically-driven Deep State government bureaucrats. **_[With your support](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52120&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMjQxNTI4NDQ=)_** we will also be prepared to respond when new challenges to the rule of law and the people's lawful "right to know" arise.
_And these days, challenges arise nearly daily_!
**_[With your support](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52120&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMjQxNTI4NDQ=)_** Judicial Watch will keep fighting effectively and successfully as America's leading independent conservative watchdog in Washington. Thank you.
Sincerely,
Thomas Fitton President
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52120&L=21309&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xNTMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMjQxNTI4NDQ=)

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: RADICAL RAPHAEL WARNOCK WOULD ABOLISH CASH BAIL, FURTHER ENDANGERING GEORGIA FAMILIES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, NOVEMBER 24, 2020 RADICAL RAPHAEL WARNOCK WOULD ABOLISH CASH BAIL, FURTHER ENDANGERING GEORGIA FAMILIES
ATLANTA - As [revealed](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014QYc3qVEIjaJ2MwaxBWtZtGkbdbbKlANH7uU231J6zDlPGaoPOyhKtoHZb2h9ejxaItP5IgNLIqhPfDIcI-GOzU4o8GnV0qOAKfPUIRIPuzqhup4i2rW7mztJ6tCiIY4HBr6LvFyJvQ8G3RQp8cfCxRC6B81CuzqvruJ-pwEOw-J7Ff7tafBk-6yokozqFyZgPdDIn4be3aND8VIDttvEh5iNZ-6Tu3hWwScffmJ9XjnArBpxVok-7C8SQTeBpOklI-Y8fN3V5z6-3w2UtsB6OtFifYAO8L1aU1GDOEZFqc=&c=rGFjPLyU6zaTRObKdFZrMLqIG-o8fXZt5WP84btfSnKsYPs_yLBMTg==&ch=YWVVBjQ9pprS8qb9eSvnU-XydCLRMKfQHvhR24WL91Vc3RZX81G2lw==) today by Fox News, radical Raphael Warnock has publicly and vocally advocated to abolish cash bail - a policy that would threaten the safety of our families and communities by enabling violent criminals to roam free. This weak-on-crime stance from Radical Raphael is not surprising, given his previous comments [attacking](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014QYc3qVEIjaJ2MwaxBWtZtGkbdbbKlANH7uU231J6zDlPGaoPOyhKnquHPYhDbP4cLXgjlomMS_U0fZNzWh4gkOzMiSo3lMzJzwWUvzqGyRdDMAXymdcw3mw0G5ETkAWRlT4FCFJ4Sqcl7bSnitr5T1s_J7Dg5fLmS-VGGdMFQKC53LJVyfMGX9aVKwzNAtPU8KG98r260ZewE_ts_W8N4oUTifsIfavHM7Xgxh3B1vRoKY5RxTsVJAseobA8r6a8XWl-249p-hi7InSN28w7g==&c=rGFjPLyU6zaTRObKdFZrMLqIG-o8fXZt5WP84btfSnKsYPs_yLBMTg==&ch=YWVVBjQ9pprS8qb9eSvnU-XydCLRMKfQHvhR24WL91Vc3RZX81G2lw==) police as "bullies" and "thugs," [demanding](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014QYc3qVEIjaJ2MwaxBWtZtGkbdbbKlANH7uU231J6zDlPGaoPOyhKmUN4a2nzKUbYGRGp-SZDEnlajJcd0v1wBqKeaSMHRk6aby50R6uiJToZfCjwZQvfIKoi0Mk0PC3n6be6hu9DqTulmxwzvnPAJ0d4bUr8aSnQ_nNya-DYi_pKs2tpUlzp_Uf7ThUQ10JLw28gaJiwJZkCgPLblgQvyGdMgSr9aV5Zt4lvdOguvIpRu35upiFeEuLrF0lyH7y6CahoJxW-Ac-Wjw0erUOX6xKu0UYaALr3_-LHdv5G_0=&c=rGFjPLyU6zaTRObKdFZrMLqIG-o8fXZt5WP84btfSnKsYPs_yLBMTg==&ch=YWVVBjQ9pprS8qb9eSvnU-XydCLRMKfQHvhR24WL91Vc3RZX81G2lw==) authorities empty the jails, [railing](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014QYc3qVEIjaJ2MwaxBWtZtGkbdbbKlANH7uU231J6zDlPGaoPOyhKi1hldD4Od6gK4qj5JwNh6sHHrxRxYxUqU3yBBfVhGX9DDCP5Q7N6e0Ujr56wD34izhRxVv6dzyQinroqkhizErmIx3Rs7VsoDd12Ktz5gsvj-rN4JTHi_CJZ_ZGihxYawGp2EUIDcAolNQDclVDpcx07yU6sqBIYulV5r-iybvqcb6bNYpZR7Pjz1L2ATrGXFQDwscyfnRKbKVSxRH6l3g=&c=rGFjPLyU6zaTRObKdFZrMLqIG-o8fXZt5WP84btfSnKsYPs_yLBMTg==&ch=YWVVBjQ9pprS8qb9eSvnU-XydCLRMKfQHvhR24WL91Vc3RZX81G2lw==) against the 2nd Amendment and [defending](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014QYc3qVEIjaJ2MwaxBWtZtGkbdbbKlANH7uU231J6zDlPGaoPOyhKqLi5lVexGWsa65jb-kbvygM5dVg_TYYJ3eMBW3ydSmYehsgZFtRJGg8Rcqi7wbDaUWXH5Xk3IaFcT5XOmGQa9GT79WZzcYuFmTTeD4UoDXARESA3WcWW4tnv4-xTAuhqD5LxdjZpgGONMSzJvvaDYz_-TTQOpo_bJOg48kSW36cP8jEFb_eBha7M2sKBt4mM1462MeLUwpSyGxBx2CG8Db0O3d0PKqY-A==&c=rGFjPLyU6zaTRObKdFZrMLqIG-o8fXZt5WP84btfSnKsYPs_yLBMTg==&ch=YWVVBjQ9pprS8qb9eSvnU-XydCLRMKfQHvhR24WL91Vc3RZX81G2lw==) convicted cop killers.
"We already knew that Raphael Warnock had no respect for our brave men and women in law enforcement, or our selfless servicemembers in the military. Now it's clear that he has little regard for the safety of Georgians, period. " said Communications Director Stephen Lawson. "Kelly Loeffler proudly supports Georgia's uniformed officers - and will continue to stand for law and order in our communities and ensure the safety and security of Georgia's families."
As Fox News [reports](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014QYc3qVEIjaJ2MwaxBWtZtGkbdbbKlANH7uU231J6zDlPGaoPOyhKtoHZb2h9ejxaItP5IgNLIqhPfDIcI-GOzU4o8GnV0qOAKfPUIRIPuzqhup4i2rW7mztJ6tCiIY4HBr6LvFyJvQ8G3RQp8cfCxRC6B81CuzqvruJ-pwEOw-J7Ff7tafBk-6yokozqFyZgPdDIn4be3aND8VIDttvEh5iNZ-6Tu3hWwScffmJ9XjnArBpxVok-7C8SQTeBpOklI-Y8fN3V5z6-3w2UtsB6OtFifYAO8L1aU1GDOEZFqc=&c=rGFjPLyU6zaTRObKdFZrMLqIG-o8fXZt5WP84btfSnKsYPs_yLBMTg==&ch=YWVVBjQ9pprS8qb9eSvnU-XydCLRMKfQHvhR24WL91Vc3RZX81G2lw==):
[Democratic](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014QYc3qVEIjaJ2MwaxBWtZtGkbdbbKlANH7uU231J6zDlPGaoPOyhKtoHZb2h9ejx7eSWAnAI5hRcIpTOgX5abt-DpQ3w9RkBG_39YNCQ92l3sX0kyVS5UiIMMgi7oluV_TnWT7_tKwaFG4t82dt6zCrRXpqFJWuQnpHvKq_fUMOQ2dkaZxV8YCjutHjd_382dPoum1IRPcU=&c=rGFjPLyU6zaTRObKdFZrMLqIG-o8fXZt5WP84btfSnKsYPs_yLBMTg==&ch=YWVVBjQ9pprS8qb9eSvnU-XydCLRMKfQHvhR24WL91Vc3RZX81G2lw==) Georgia U.S. Senate candidate Raphael Warnock has long opposed cash bail, the system that requires people to put up money as essentially collateral to ensure they appear for court dates, even as the Democratic Party didn't put the policy in its platform until 2020...
The pastor and now-Senate candidate also defended the policy in the months after its passing as members of the Atlanta City Council and the public began to have misgivings following what according to the Atlanta Journal-Constitution was an approximately 100% spike in people failing to appear for their court dates -- a scenario cash bail is meant to prevent. The paper reported that it was not clear exactly how many of the failure to appear cases were because of the new city ordinance...
"Slavery is as old as this country, and it is as wrong as it is old. And so I stand to say that I support this new ordinance. We ought to end money bail. We ought to end wealth-based detention," Warnock said to the Atlanta City Council as it was considering the bail reform ordinance. "...We ought to call cash bail what [it] is: Wealth-based detention. Atlanta ought to be leading the way. Leave the ordinance in place..."
Efforts to end cash bail specifically grabbed headlines again in 2020 after New York state did away with cash bail and the New York Police Department (NYPD) [blamed the reform](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014QYc3qVEIjaJ2MwaxBWtZtGkbdbbKlANH7uU231J6zDlPGaoPOyhKtoHZb2h9ejxHTBx3Iz9r9HmZ8nSLy6LlHfrFYupsy_B5ntCXRVwfyDqU_TEVBfgqUGUco8o89v5kdp3P4_4FopNpw762sQJ5ux3sHrbjDoTAtcYxeOjGJi_uWvwOEfPXtmGwblUvFOC-x-DIX2CMqPfPFidQXYrSn-DlEB1OcTBgAh9G6y2VFE=&c=rGFjPLyU6zaTRObKdFZrMLqIG-o8fXZt5WP84btfSnKsYPs_yLBMTg==&ch=YWVVBjQ9pprS8qb9eSvnU-XydCLRMKfQHvhR24WL91Vc3RZX81G2lw==) for an increase in crime early in the year. "Criminal justice reforms serve as a significant reason New York City has seen this uptick in crime," the NYPD said in a press release in early March.
And during the protests and riots following the death of George Floyd, bail funds gained popularity as a place for those hoping to support demonstrators arrested by police. Vice President-elect Kamala Harris and a number of Biden campaign staffers directed donations to the Minnesota Freedom Fund (MFF) in order "to help post bail for those protesting on the ground in Minnesota."
The MFF and other bail funds like it post bail for those who are arrested, then get that money back as long as those they bailed out show up for their court dates. The support was consistent with Biden's stated policy position, which called cash bail a "modern-day debtors' prison."

| BACKGROUND:
Video of the February 5, 2018 Atlanta City Council Meeting Shows that Warnock Argued for Ending the Entire U.S. Cash Bail System - Warnock Compared Cash Bail to "Slavery" and Said, "We Ought to End Money Bail. We Ought to End Wealth-Based Detention...This System Must Change" The February 5, 2018 Atlanta City Council meeting video confirms that Warnock spoke in the public comment period in support of Mayor Bottoms' proposal to abolish cash bail for certain offenses. However, Warnock did not simply speak in support of Mayor Bottoms proposal - he said, "Atlanta ought to lead the way" and argued against the entire cash bail system in the United States. Warnock said of the U.S. cash bail system: "We ought to end money bail. We ought to end wealth- based detention...This system must change." Warnock even compared the cash bail system in the U.S. to "slavery" - pointing out that both are "as old as the country" and that "Slavery is as old as this country, and it is as wrong as it is old" - and insinuated that cash bail does not hurt drug dealers because they can use their drug money to pay for bail. ([Atlanta City Council Meeting Video](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014QYc3qVEIjaJ2MwaxBWtZtGkbdbbKlANH7uU231J6zDlPGaoPOyhKtoHZb2h9ejx5ZNHUlmU4s1XC28W86Peevp7v-9uUU2WYozTZ1vHzlkdfSIi89eUR3jvqFgsFim5NWtBH6g3SrSZeXTZmrtep_12HzYLo8ds3_aWU0_76JpLhVrngRXbxAouyagJwk3Ya5gubon7RqIAwyfRRj-FrTMqglp_G6o1&c=rGFjPLyU6zaTRObKdFZrMLqIG-o8fXZt5WP84btfSnKsYPs_yLBMTg==&ch=YWVVBjQ9pprS8qb9eSvnU-XydCLRMKfQHvhR24WL91Vc3RZX81G2lw==), 2/5/2018, Min. 1:38:35) - [VIDEO CLIP](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014QYc3qVEIjaJ2MwaxBWtZtGkbdbbKlANH7uU231J6zDlPGaoPOyhKtoHZb2h9ejxiA5quGvH8P68dWRaYBrxCvQqxvw-PSVtk0uvwCOF45IBfNB4Tskc37f5h42pIy85BDg1vbsQmOX48hh3kz2xqqT1bF28RaOUeTgyUc5Y4_yAjt6WQmcqyxu_VDd45fnUwNDHWlgEV68J-he3r-JqumZgUfAU8FatZTs0HW4K5Tw2npKMvA7B3Q==&c=rGFjPLyU6zaTRObKdFZrMLqIG-o8fXZt5WP84btfSnKsYPs_yLBMTg==&ch=YWVVBjQ9pprS8qb9eSvnU-XydCLRMKfQHvhR24WL91Vc3RZX81G2lw==)
At a June 2018 Press Conference, Warnock Called for an End to Cash Bail in the United States - Warnock Criticized the U.S. as the "Mass Incarceration Capital of the World" and then Said "We Gather this Day to Say, Let's Fix It. Let's End Cash Bail" At a June 2018 press conference, Warnock called for an end to cash bail in the United States. Warnock argued that the United States is the "Mass Incarceration Capital of the world," that the cash bail system "actually create[s] the conditions that lead to crime," and said "So we gather this day to say, let's fix it. Let's end cash bail." (Groundswell Movement, "#LetMyPeopleGo: End Mass Incarceration in the Land of the Free," [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014QYc3qVEIjaJ2MwaxBWtZtGkbdbbKlANH7uU231J6zDlPGaoPOyhKtoHZb2h9ejxjdmT_hu_On6Uldstm5uRR4TRM3FRtcoZvV2HWKKueZcYu9tUFS_W4IRvd1PoMH6rGjeUzpF4Du2Y-gbPGV78xZKat4ae-WO1Joqz9EMI8V6OH6MUCuhZZx4LELer1wlL&c=rGFjPLyU6zaTRObKdFZrMLqIG-o8fXZt5WP84btfSnKsYPs_yLBMTg==&ch=YWVVBjQ9pprS8qb9eSvnU-XydCLRMKfQHvhR24WL91Vc3RZX81G2lw==), 6/22/2018, Min. 1:06) - [VIDEO CLIP](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014QYc3qVEIjaJ2MwaxBWtZtGkbdbbKlANH7uU231J6zDlPGaoPOyhKtoHZb2h9ejxTgWR7Fl953QBS9KZz7oTyrL6sSMccJXE0MgPbO5hwvpcxs4NyytskyBS9OSMl9OwuuBn2HVJ-S3Q4zZDkqTSJvdxFZ1zLq9lVJpWnXwtpi3glprU_ViM8lgjjjsl5ox8e_fBq8QB2aEri0kHJwMyXyXARp1iieP0FBLsm0uN_WaLH-X0GpQBNA==&c=rGFjPLyU6zaTRObKdFZrMLqIG-o8fXZt5WP84btfSnKsYPs_yLBMTg==&ch=YWVVBjQ9pprS8qb9eSvnU-XydCLRMKfQHvhR24WL91Vc3RZX81G2lw==)
In June 2018, the Saporta Report (an Atlanta Business & Politics Blog) Reported that Warnock Was Leading a Campaign in the Atlanta Area "Asking Prosecutors to Refrain from Demands for Cash Bail for the Vast Majority of Offenses" In June 2018, the Saporta Report (an Atlanta business & politics blog) reported that Warnock was leading the "Freedom Day Bailout Campaign." Warnock's "Freedom Day Bailout Campaign" had two components - directly paying the bail for criminal defendants, and lobbying prosecutors against the use of bail in criminal cases. The Saporta Report reported that the "Freedom Day Bailout Campaign" was "asking prosecutors to refrain from demands for cash bail for the vast majority of offenses." The Saporta Report quoted Tiffany Roberts, who serves as Warnock's "Social Justice Ministry chair" at Ebenezer Baptist Church, saying "for a poor person, or a person of modest means, or even a middle-class family, a $10,000 bond, which would be $1,000 to the bondsman, might as well be a million dollars." ("Ebenezer Baptist advances criminal justice campaign with holiday bailout," [Saporta Report](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014QYc3qVEIjaJ2MwaxBWtZtGkbdbbKlANH7uU231J6zDlPGaoPOyhKtoHZb2h9ejxCEzHXOQVe2VlEtWvV3GtcJ8LnaayWJwBiSEO1CD2rPjzPxTp0HEf3cW--RDaheKgiSmOUiJK2Iazfr-9oNGKzEXaMM4jNweK7b5WBfe-hItRez0TzlHtQhnjpwlXFXU43i-HkDlN8aDtYduSia1dxqhZuMxm6_T8sW1jESKIDvUfSGUu37Myqg==&c=rGFjPLyU6zaTRObKdFZrMLqIG-o8fXZt5WP84btfSnKsYPs_yLBMTg==&ch=YWVVBjQ9pprS8qb9eSvnU-XydCLRMKfQHvhR24WL91Vc3RZX81G2lw==), 6/7/2018)
In October 2018, the Atlanta Journal-Constitution Reported that Abolishing Cash Bail for Certain Offenses Led to "a Massive Increase in the Number of People Failing to Appear for Their Court Date" in Atlanta - but Warnock Defended Abolishing Bail, Saying "We Ought to Call Cash Bail What It Is: Wealth-Based Detention. Atlanta Ought to Be Leading the Way. Leave the [Bail Abolishment] Ordinance in Place" Councilmember Michael Julian Bond complained that "[t]he clear result is a 'get out of jail free' card" and that "this was supposed to help the oppressed, but what about those people whose car was vandalized?...they show up in court but the defendant is nowhere to be found. And they're left holding the bag." However, Warnock defended the abolition of cash bail for certain offenses in Atlanta, saying "we ought to call cash bail what it is: wealth-based detention. Atlanta ought to be leading the way. Leave the ordinance in place." ("More defendants miss court date since some cash bonds dropped," [Atlanta Journal-Constitution](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014QYc3qVEIjaJ2MwaxBWtZtGkbdbbKlANH7uU231J6zDlPGaoPOyhKtoHZb2h9ejxIO5AL8HpRa_sVPQA_Yv2tLaD9zfli5ZjdgCyr43Ie6X-w80wGa6giOLYcO3vqWI3brhFrDpbwjCIDbOoDHe4qcXYGieUoXlsUZb6_ZdkaDnQyakmDqy6AfZGRs67jVnnXqV5EJuK-xtowvI4LddrciXlN3vYT0BdBK1f1Vh63gpobqi8Qs3fF33ZTpQjeul-QHKOwIJXVQuAmfvD1QNqLHcHjzF6e5cj&c=rGFjPLyU6zaTRObKdFZrMLqIG-o8fXZt5WP84btfSnKsYPs_yLBMTg==&ch=YWVVBjQ9pprS8qb9eSvnU-XydCLRMKfQHvhR24WL91Vc3RZX81G2lw==), 10/5/2018)
In August 2019, Bond also criticized the bail policy, which he called "a failure" and "a real revolving door." ("Criticism bubbles up under Atlanta's policy to curtail cash bail," [Saporta Report](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014QYc3qVEIjaJ2MwaxBWtZtGkbdbbKlANH7uU231J6zDlPGaoPOyhKtoHZb2h9ejxpcSmLp3FzY4hNMk51QcDyIPEqEOe6H754-nbWJED1t2HQ2VKq_AprwXQr8Y39Ir3EuEp_7NNJIN9XRY8MX8Y3xA0G2_3pnFV4bTdzEzFFALKfW3flvihux86KTONRfMz7zOrq7qNo3hNfKwwHgnwA-q9L2pfRBxEfQS2CYm8rnc=&c=rGFjPLyU6zaTRObKdFZrMLqIG-o8fXZt5WP84btfSnKsYPs_yLBMTg==&ch=YWVVBjQ9pprS8qb9eSvnU-XydCLRMKfQHvhR24WL91Vc3RZX81G2lw==), 8/20/2019)
In March 2019, 11 Alive Published an Expose on the Shortcomings of Atlanta Abolishing Cash Bail for Certain Offenses, Entitled "They Were Arrested But Didn't Go to Court: Does Atlanta's Bail Reform Lack Justice?" - 11 Alive Reported "the Number of People Failing to Appear Has Increased 40 Percent in the Past Year" In March 2019, the television station 11 Alive published an expose on the shortcomings of Atlanta abolishing cash bail for certain offenses, entitled "They Were Arrested But Didn't Go to Court: Does Atlanta's Bail Reform Lack Justice?" 11 Alive reported "the number of people failing to appear has increased 40 percent in the past year" following the City of Atlanta's change in bail policy. ("They Were Arrested But Didn't Go to Court: Does Atlanta's Bail Reform Lack Justice?" [11 Alive](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014QYc3qVEIjaJ2MwaxBWtZtGkbdbbKlANH7uU231J6zDlPGaoPOyhKtoHZb2h9ejxdfyiE_Xaa-8YOCUtbU5en0lwPpwZQD3S2SMeHOnwhCSfeqdIf7M2w6Zl4It567VP3UpsynY5YXVv-4ZNlNQZGjmhasL0FqbRuBqdjV7a1cRd3dx2OIMwBCJnrpSc4xumoVQbAWsCnB2HrgEUByAl188lr4KRmBpI26MLLg0Pm7hAD4u0YJln3TnAr0US_zwa8jGci1X0ES4jO4u6czV6YIzgkLxGWBG_LOx8dhLbMTigrxS-L4aUtFdz9i75AyWLAe4k7mw0It-t0ivy6BaHMCZLoUrT5lFmUNU0R4LeqYcS69F3HO7S4g==&c=rGFjPLyU6zaTRObKdFZrMLqIG-o8fXZt5WP84btfSnKsYPs_yLBMTg==&ch=YWVVBjQ9pprS8qb9eSvnU-XydCLRMKfQHvhR24WL91Vc3RZX81G2lw==), 3/26/2019)

| | Friend - Over 760,000 Georgia voters have requested their mail ballots for the January 5 runoff election that will decide both of Georgia's U.S. Senators and Public Service Commissioner. **Don 't wait-- join your fellow Georgians by requesting your mail ballot today at [ballotrequest.sos.ga.gov](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4f6/34a064cc/1a5ffb99/7022526/2981612958/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://ballotrequest.sos.ga.gov"). ** **Ballots will be mailed soon.** Once you receive your ballot, complete and return it right away. You can return your ballot to a drop box in your county, your county elections board, or by mail. Find a drop box in your county [here](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4f6/34a064cc/1a5ffb99/7022527/2981612958/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://gaballotdropbox.org"). **Why vote?** The January 5 runoff elections are your chance to build on the progress we've made in Georgia and across the country and help ensure access to healthcare is a right and that justice can be guaranteed! These elections are also our best opportunity to get this pandemic under control and turn the page to a hopeful future. If you have any vote by mail or registration questions, please call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816 for help. You can find additional information at [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4f6/34a064cc/1a5ffb99/7022524/2981612958/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://www.peachvote.com"). January 5 will be here before you know it. Make sure you request your mail ballot [today](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4f6/34a064cc/1a5ffb99/7022526/2981612958/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://ballotrequest.sos.ga.gov")! \- Team Fair Fight P.S. Are you having issues with [ballotrequest.sos.ga.gov](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4f6/34a064cc/1a5ffb99/7022526/2981612958/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://ballotrequest.sos.ga.gov")? Don't worry! You can use [this fillable PDF application](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4f6/34a064cc/1a5ffb99/7022525/2981612958/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://sos.ga.gov/admin/files/Absentee%20Ballot%20Fillable%20form%20820.pdf") to request your mail ballot. Just return your application by mail, fax, email (as an attachment), or in person to your [County Board of Elections Office](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4f6/34a064cc/1a5ffb99/7022522/2981612958/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://elections.sos.ga.gov/Elections/countyregistrars.do"). If you need any help or don't have a printer, call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816. |
---|---|---

body:
We’ve seen some HUGE wins in Indiana — help us keep them going! >>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470026?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-success-building-112320?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_success_building_112320&mc_cid=e792d27afd&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Hoosier Republican,

Your Indiana Republican Party is on a winning streak!

In 2016, Indiana was first on the board for President Trump and Vice President Pence, sent Sen. Todd Young to the U.S. Senate, and elected conservative Eric Holcomb as Governor.

In 2018, Sen. Mike Braun won one of the most hotly-contested Senate races in the country.

In 2019, conservatives won 70 mayorships, the most in history. We flipped the entire city council in Kokomo and former Democrat strongholds like Muncie, Logansport, and Michigan City also elected Republican mayors.

And then in 2020, Indiana went Red in support of President Trump, expanded our supermajority in the Indiana House, maintained our supermajority in the Indiana Senate, re-elected Governor Holcomb with a historic vote total, elected Todd Rokita Attorney General, and won another nationally-targeted congressional race with Victoria Spartz’s win in the 5th District.

As Hoosier Republicans, we have incredible momentum, but it’s crucial that we don’t get complacent and LOSE it. The Democrats are going to be ALL IN for the next battle, and we need to rebuild our war chest so that we’ll have the resources necessary to keep winning.

Will you please help by chipping in $5 to help continue this incredible momentum?
CHIP IN NOW >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-success-building-112320?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_success_building_112320&mc_cid=e792d27afd&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

We can’t let up. We have to keep fighting the liberal coastal elite with deep pockets trying to make gains here in the heartland. We have to protect the gains we have made across the state!

If we want to keep winning, we need the resources to continue supporting Republican candidates across Indiana.

Will you please dig deep and help our party one more time? (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-success-building-112320?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_success_building_112320&mc_cid=e792d27afd&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Thanks for helping out,
Kyle Hupfer

body:
It won't be a normal Thanksgiving this year with many Americans making the safe decision to avoid the kinds of family gatherings [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=376907cfbe5140e1add10b874ceb2443&_e=AL9XG_b0uq65YlOdotA9O5g_x3_x0agC2GgIch03uwvh_jIQqOiJP6m4e8tJVW4l7w3F_9d-7mliu69ydmEaGOcg1jJxDuTdSbiDlx3u5bqC69IFFDuoG10_lumRLE3YtbhBg1B9Nrps4CJUN8OjdgpL-FDSYWDT_YS9WaLXxXDmwXRk4M2u1KRArDxZVE1R1DLzxlxP0QmKv6_1_7PqXoSM07njHybhXWnHpDT3ryZB5QtfGfWRi6jHCqaFs-E1xFfP2Pt7TYJ6-rqNsVIqNQ%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter - It won't be a normal Thanksgiving this year with many Americans making the safe decision to avoid large family gatherings.

And while we may not be able to gather as in years past, we can still appreciate the opportunity to pause and reflect on the things we are thankful for in our lives. For many, this would also be the time for charitable actions in the community, and while the pandemic is preventing some of these, each of us can still make a donation to a charity that may be working to help those in need.

I am thankful for my family, for my faith and for the opportunities I've had to use my voice to inspire positive change and healing in America. From our family to yours, we're wishing you a very Happy Thanksgiving!

-John
|
---
**Thank You:**

In the weeks leading up to the November election, we asked our supporters to chip in to help raise funds to support Republican members of the U.S. House's [Problem Solvers Caucus](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=376907cfbe5140e1add10b874ceb2443&_e=AL9XG_b0uq65YlOdotA9O5hbMQbsRPN6_UWViUWe78KEUhX-1HBa4jJSNHsTX4j1N6YYPlkmUkf0XclZjVQ1dsMP6mTLMt9Uj9OEKo4ogWJR-Y0FKqsG5TDfpfXFCYIjSFKHQWr_Uts5Sn3LPy-6URMQryfuYz1JciSEfXGpkRvsK4rlTvZi2nSy5gIxEbeGS4bw8qDsJHgwikD1T1OXZrQYm71wSViTdEpoZy5wOqXYEqcmqAGypRw3wFFNiWKuyKpyRbLciabHxlodgkaDimIgdqyGdHfb_Mj85OOPmBM%3D). They ran strong campaigns and all of the members we helped won their re-elections. We can't thank you enough for what you did to help.

These leaders committed to working across the aisle to build compromise and help solve critical issues that are so important to American families. We can be proud of the work we did and will do in the future to break the gridlock in D.C. and get things done. Thank you!

|

name: Nikki Haley
subject: All eyes are on us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend,

**This is how the math adds up:**

After going from homeless to the House of Representatives in under a decade, Kat Cammack is proof that hard work, grit, and sacrifice can lead to tremendous success here in the greatest country on Earth. | == | However, this American Dream that propelled Kat to the Halls of Congress is continually under threat by some on the Left. These socialists believe that what makes our country great needs to be torn down, and that hard-working Americans need to be taxed and controlled until freedom and opportunity no longer endure for future generations. Kat is committed to stopping this Socialism when she serves as our representative! == | | | == | For Florida and America, Team Kat | | | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: Day. After. Day.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Thank you to everyone who stepped up.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=4683%2E53494%2EuiAc6k) Friend, First, a thank you is in order. This past week, we were humbled to see so many people answer the call to become official Evergreen Day One Donors. We have a lot to be thankful for this week. Thanks to all those who chipped in, we're on track to keep rolling out policy recommendations, laying out a vision for defeating the climate crisis and for creating millions of good-paying jobs in a new, just, and inclusive clean energy economy. We have the plans in hand -- now we're working to build the political will. With Joe Biden headed to the White House and so many supporters standing with us, we're incredibly hopeful that we can achieve our mission of defeating climate change and building the just, inclusive clean energy future we need. We'll be doing the work day after day until Day One of the Biden administration -- and all the days thereafter -- to push bold climate action to the top of America's agenda. Thank you for being a part of that work. With gratitude, Jamal Raad
Co-Founder and Campaign Director, Evergreen Action | [DONATE ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1217?t=3&akid=4683%2E53494%2EuiAc6k)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4683%2E53494%2EuiAc6k). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

name: Team Stanton
subject: It's Time To Put The Country First
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friend,

Twenty one days have passed since the election and Donald Trump still refuses to concede. Joe Biden secured a historic victory on November 3rd. The American people have spoken and they voted for change. Nevertheless, in the midst of a horrific pandemic, we have seen Trump disrespect the office of the presidency, and damage our democracy by refusing to acknowledge Joe Biden as the winner. Meanwhile, thousands have lost their lives, hospitals and healthcare workers are exhausted, and millions of Americans are facing severe economic hardship. We need leadership during this critical time in order to save lives and help millions of Americans.

**[Will you sign on to demand that President Trump concede to President-elect Biden and accept the decision that the American people made on November 3?](https://act.myngp.com/el/LOL6MADPmyLr1UDlZ8FzWwI1R69RHUKoIIJwmxvhHQ8=/rjmbdMXJnKY4vL9po0ai-KUCs_ePBKx0BRE-BMFrfws=)**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/LOL6MADPmyLr1UDlZ8FzWwI1R69RHUKoIIJwmxvhHQ8=/rjmbdMXJnKY4vL9po0ai-KUCs_ePBKx0BRE-BMFrfws=)

Thanks for your support,

\-- _Team Stanton_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---
Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/LOL6MADPmyLr1UDlZ8FzWwI1R69RHUKoIIJwmxvhHQ8=/Sbw4jcFfS1FolbyGeE2OgqIZlYsft1oZk2pay06hUPY=).

subject: back to square one
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
You are receiving this email from 314 Action Fund because you've previously expressed interest or taken part in our efforts. If you'd rather not get all of our updates you can [click here](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb6d39/4bd7760e/6a74de5a/77ab10b6/436553440/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/less-email/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_201125_12m_none_STD_1_warnock&source=314_EM_FR_201125_12m_none_STD_1_warnock&refcode=314_EM_FR_201125_12m_none_STD_1_warnock") for only the most important emails.

To unsubscribe instantly [you can click here.](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb6d39/4bd7760e/6a74de5a/77ab10b5/436553440/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI2YTc0ZGU1YSIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjI5YmI2ZDM5In0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://act.314actionfund.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/6a74de5a/29bb6d39?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+you+can+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_201125_12m_none_STD_1_warnock&source=314_EM_FR_201125_12m_none_STD_1_warnock&refcode=314_EM_FR_201125_12m_none_STD_1_warnock")
| [](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb6d39/4bd7760e/6a74de5a/77ab10b4/436553440/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-warnocksplit?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_201125_12m_none_STD_1_warnock&source=314_EM_FR_201125_12m_none_STD_1_warnock&refcode=314_EM_FR_201125_12m_none_STD_1_warnock")
Friends, I just want to say _thank you_.

Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've proven the pundits wrong and forced the GOP into a runoff election. We've shown the country that a new South is coming - one that is bold, inclusive and forward-thinking. And we've come one step closer to making history in Georgia.

**But I'll be honest: I've got an incredibly tough fight ahead.** We poured every cent we had into getting this far - which means we're now back to square one. With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with MILLIONS in attack ads, and we're already facing a $50,000 budget deficit.

**That's why I'm asking directly:** [Will you give $10 to help us close this critical gap, win in Georgia and secure a Democratic Senate majority?](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb6d39/4bd7760e/6a74de5a/77ab10b3/436553440/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-warnocksplit?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Will+you+give+ask+to+help+us+close+this+&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_201125_12m_none_STD_1_warnock&source=314_EM_FR_201125_12m_none_STD_1_warnock&refcode=314_EM_FR_201125_12m_none_STD_1_warnock")

When we launched this campaign, I knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has had a target on our backs from day one, and they haven't let up since.

Mitch McConnell and his Republican allies have spent millions to drown us out, crush our people-powered momentum and prop up my far-right opponent. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to keep this seat red.

That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **Election experts from Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight to NBC confirm we can win this key Senate race - but not without grassroots support.**

With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to kickstart this runoff election, and I'm counting on folks like you to give now. So please, team: [Will you make a contribution of $10 or more to defeat the GOP, flip this seat blue and secure a Senate majority for Democrats?](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb6d39/4bd7760e/6a74de5a/77ab10b2/436553440/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-warnocksplit?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+Will+you+make+a+contribution+of+ask+or+m&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_201125_12m_none_STD_1_warnock&source=314_EM_FR_201125_12m_none_STD_1_warnock&refcode=314_EM_FR_201125_12m_none_STD_1_warnock") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | | | | | ****[Donate $10 Now](https://act.314actionfund.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-warnocksplit?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=10&express_lane=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+Donate+ask+Now&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_201125_12m_none_STD_1_warnock&source=314_EM_FR_201125_12m_none_STD_1_warnock&refcode=314_EM_FR_201125_12m_none_STD_1_warnock")****

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 2.1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb6d39/4bd7760e/6a74de5a/77ab10ba/436553440/VEsHBg/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=13+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_201125_12m_none_STD_1_warnock&source=314_EM_FR_201125_12m_none_STD_1_warnock")** to make a donation.

name: Roger Misso
subject: Election recap for our friends and supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

2020 has been a busy year here at Taking the Hill. We hired staff, broke fundraising records, and took our efforts completely digital during an historic pandemic. We did all of this to support our more than three dozen veteran and military family member candidates for Congress.

As the dust settles from Election Night and [nearly all of the votes have been counted,](https://act.myngp.com/el/su2FQKWPwW5rwOHa6-Z5DF9edaazpDukb3Bwa7f3KYw=/nDJzAq-d2GSv7qT2pNWOn8zvxkTfUh_zo1MEQf8ouzM=?usp=sharing) we wanted to say THANK YOU to those who have contributed so far and give you an update on how our candidates fared. We look forward to joining with our sister and brother veteran organizations to develop deeper lessons learned about how we can support veteran and military family candidates even better in the next election cycle.

We had some successes:
* Mark Kelly is Senator-elect of Arizona
* John Hickenlooper is Senator-elect of Colorado
* Gary Peters is re-elected as Senator of Michigan
* Deb Haaland, Madeleine Dean, Chrissy Houlahan, Mikie Sherrill, Elissa Slotkin, Conor Lamb, and Elaine Luria are all re-elected to the US House of Representatives

We had some heartbreaks:
* In Senate seats and House districts in Kentucky, Ohio, Florida, New York, California, and others

And we still have more work to do:
* In Georgia! Where BOTH of our endorsed US Senate candidates have advanced to a runoff election on January 5th. [_**If you are interested in helping us develop our "Taking Back Georgia" strategy, you can start by chipping in here.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/su2FQKWPwW5rwOHa6-Z5DF9edaazpDukb3Bwa7f3KYw=/slnPQNqbs_TWxJvh5tqr-FvjunWyuq0n3p1o895GduU=)

We are so proud of each and every single one of our candidates. They fought hard in a difficult election cycle under challenging, historic circumstances. We remain as committed as ever to support good candidates of integrity from the veterans and military families communities - to elect them, to care for their health, and to celebrate their excellence.

Thank you ALL for chipping in so far this year! Remember: our work isn't done yet. Let's go win Georgia!

In solidarity,
Roger

_Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/su2FQKWPwW5rwOHa6-Z5DF9edaazpDukb3Bwa7f3KYw=/TIp16-qd6Y648WBugBVhsmv_w6SZWYk7ce_3tp3uqNw=)_
[_@RogerMissoCNY_](https://act.myngp.com/el/su2FQKWPwW5rwOHa6-Z5DF9edaazpDukb3Bwa7f3KYw=/YQStH7uZBNNYoX16DSwbmW5JLfnwVa4n8b1h_nezNn0=)

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
---
Taking The Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States

clean_body: | | | | | Well, I’ll get right to it. We’re behind on our November fundraising goal. While he’s been recovering from COVID-19, Governor Sisolak has been hard at work (from home!) to restore our economy, protect our voting rights, and keep Nevadans safe during this pandemic. As Steve’s Finance Director, it’s my job to help make up the gap. That’s why I’m reaching out to his strongest supporters for help. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Nevada Democrats made small but critical gains in the elections. This progress was made possible by the work of this grassroots team to build up a movement step-by-step. That’s why staying on course with our monthly goals is vital to continuing the progress we’re making for workers’ rights, public education, healthcare access, and more. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for your continued support, Eva Black Finance Director Steve Sisolak for Nevada Governor | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for by Steve Sisolak for Governor Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Remember these names: Mort & Larvita
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_two_minnesotas&n=1)
---
Peter \-- There are two names you need to know this week. The first one is Erik Mortensen (Mort for short). We already told you about him. Mort was our star candidate who took out one of Walz' cronies in the House in the November election. _Mort is hosting a backyard party at his home this week with 20 friends. Unlike most cowardly legislators who are too afraid to publicly stand up to the Governor, Mort wrote a letter to Walz and Attorney General Keith Ellison inviting them over for his defiant act. He was challenging them to come arrest him!_ That's courage! But so is the next name you need to know...
## Larvita!
Imagine being a single mom of four girls and trying to build a business in 2020. That's Larvita's story. She runs a gymnastics studio and restaurant in the small town of Lynd, MN. When Governor Walz unilaterally decreed that gyms and restaurants be shut down, she simply [REFUSED to obey his illegal order](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=mI7Ws0NkibYEXUVfFZeJkP3PhfK237Fylz6METUvXGKlcyPTvXlMlr_jJlCVDU6LT0lypidyGfycg6rk0Usobz8FzXh7VS-gO8WuzgIB0Bxl0XC9TpxdJCjh4DJpalWetxz6BSZ628XBZGVLDnTQT8hnLoW1lCnYYN_16qYgqos&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_two_minnesotas&n=2). **That's when the story gets interesting. Larvita went to Facebook and posted a video about her struggles as a small business owner and how she must stay open in order to make ends meet. She publicly defied Governor Walz' dictate.** On Sunday, the sheriff department called her and threatened to arrest her per the Governor's Executive Order that states violators could be thrown in jail for 90 days. Then, on Monday and Tuesday she has received multiple threats by Attorney General Keith Ellison who said she could face a year in prison. **For what? Running a legal business in America?!** You know when Walz keeps telling us about his "One Minnesota" vision? Well that's complete bull***t. Here's why... Rep-Elect Erik Mortensen also received a letter from the Attorney General on Monday. However, the tone was different for an elected official. No threat of fines or jail time was made towards the newly elected legislator. Keep in mind, Mort never asked for special treatment. In fact, he is calling for the same treatment as Larvita. You see, these clowns running our state think of as their subjects. Unless you are in the protected political class, your liberties don't matter. And that's why Mort is a real champion for calling them out on it! [](https://www.action4liberty.com/a_look_into_governor_walz_two_minnesotas?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_two_minnesotas&n=3) **In the meantime, we MUST Stand with Mort and defy Walz. Let's show this Tyrant he has no authority over us!** Representative-Elect Erik Mortensen is a liberty champion that YOU helped put in office. He beat Walz' crony "yes-man", Brad Tabke, in the November election. Now he's willing to stand up for YOUR liberties. Will you stand with Mort?
## [STAND WITH MORT PLEDGE](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=kZuFY8l3J9G8vE1AIGepPWV7YN0BIFTIH67mjip8rcF3WesTZRDd3SyBtzK_Q-Sm&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_two_minnesotas&n=4)
**In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_two_minnesotas&n=5).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_two_minnesotas&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_two_minnesotas&n=7), software for leaders.

subject: BREAKING: President Trump pardons ‘Corn,’ America’s National Thanksgiving Turkey
body:
This afternoon, President Trump continued a time-honored White House tradition by pardoning this year’s National Thanksgiving Turkey... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ea8fa13d90&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • November 24, 2020
---
| | |
# **BREAKING: President Trump pardons ‘Corn,’ America’s National Thanksgiving Turkey **

**This afternoon,** President Trump continued a time-honored White House tradition by pardoning this year’s National Thanksgiving Turkey in the Rose Garden.

🎬 [**WATCH: President Trump pardons the National Thanksgiving Turkey!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3620d9c0e4&e=3ee4985eea)

**After a close vote,** Americans chose “Corn,” a 42 lb. bird from Iowa, as this year’s honoree. “Cob,” the runner-up and first alternate, will join Corn for a well-deserved retirement at Iowa State University following today’s festivities.

**“The first turkey** to dodge the White House dinner table received unofficial clemency when President Abraham Lincoln’s son, Tad, begged his father to spare his new friend,” President Trump said. Beginning with President George H. W. Bush, the National Thanksgiving Turkey now receives a formal pardon each year.

**“On behalf** of the entire Trump family, I want to wish every American a healthy and very happy Thanksgiving,” President Trump said.

**“Every American** can be united in thanksgiving to God for the incredible gifts He has bestowed upon us—the blessings of family, community, and this exceptional, beautiful, and great country.”

📖 [**Thanksgiving at the White House, Then and Now**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=49843fbb56&e=3ee4985eea)

📖 [**Read more about the 2020 Turkey Pardoning**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f9b8b1334f&e=3ee4985eea)
---

|

Democrats are preparing to go all-out to advance their liberal agenda at the expense of our conservative values | |
---
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=e894a72de0f546caafbac17f5a4e599b&_e=1kNEHOlOFk0tLA77mcSJ8oADAhrTYrYLZbiTsPcG7bdB0vv6PDmd_JysdpzHay2RMgv4B6pxqknugpPGU5unbjqHcyRjYMyqX8kiJ6kPJRNqoazGUOV74E9LS-3Xt1NAoxxOKtNz3D-wnF02aw0zS8JrrD_43GnkraOWoK3yz9FD2InBAgZNnSi247O-5aRlXfT2bp6IL70tSyc3C70CRU0trd-GoVdX6EBq5mbF_guKixa57yG3XdJoKRx40L5ZYOUahBWeQs4-_6ws3-sqGj1oq_AF8RvrEH3KRC30yp2rxqF2njeI4nxySGfW4uMdCNvNYWaa9UjUAnx-4JOLa1BtZmewHw4DQzmi2YjIyAA3mhdiYiwgTlOzVpXeqkZFTJjrlqncIKn-9FJujzfextnEBk6CzTPh13qB6ejABa31twfIGLFzEEQaM0bWwfInz16LVS5wb_mWqzo2t0gvRYTA1mRYZIA50svHBHORjGM%3D)

**I’ll be honest, friend.**

Conservatives like you and me will be facing some incredibly tough challenges over the coming weeks and months.

_Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and the rest of the Democrats in Congress are preparing to go all-out to advance their liberal agenda at the expense of the values that you and I have been fighting so hard to defend._

**That’s why I’d like to invite you to support the[Conservative Values Defense Fund](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=e894a72de0f546caafbac17f5a4e599b&_e=1kNEHOlOFk0tLA77mcSJ8oADAhrTYrYLZbiTsPcG7bdB0vv6PDmd_JysdpzHay2RMgv4B6pxqknugpPGU5unbjqHcyRjYMyqX8kiJ6kPJRNqoazGUOV74E9LS-3Xt1NAoxxOKtNz3D-wnF02aw0zS8JrrD_43GnkraOWoK3yz9FD2InBAgZNnSi247O-5aRlXfT2bp6IL70tSyc3C70CRU0trd-GoVdX6EBq5mbF_guKixa57yG3XdJoKRx40L5ZYOUahBWeQs4-_6ws3-sqGtxvPHo5WgKQw5hcjKqIcCLzNCu5fw8Uq1s_kr7Z0oviGe5Nti0BRtFv-8MFJUZPPb8ls8N9hInKfDYua6Lu7QUExBcp4YlXM1PGVO6OjtmeE0gVxloLKGoor1gcm1Up73p-cq8eIAomzx4zWh3N0Z35X5ITvGLD_jbuFhIBgxq_Au7U9Qn-HrPBxRJ5K5p6-wXkMkX3EI5XoXZnxoAfOIw%3D) that our team is launching this week. **
[**SUPPORT OUR CONSERVATIVE VALUES DEFENSE FUND**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=e894a72de0f546caafbac17f5a4e599b&_e=1kNEHOlOFk0tLA77mcSJ8oADAhrTYrYLZbiTsPcG7bdB0vv6PDmd_JysdpzHay2RMgv4B6pxqknugpPGU5unbjqHcyRjYMyqX8kiJ6kPJRNqoazGUOV74E9LS-3Xt1NAoxxOKtNz3D-wnF02aw0zS8JrrD_43GnkraOWoK3yz9FD2InBAgZNnSi247O-5aRlXfT2bp6IL70tSyc3C70CRU0trd-GoVdX6EBq5mbF_guKixa57yG3XdJoKRx40L5ZYOUahBWeQs4-_6ws3-sqGsdOx0R8ni9QsirD-2ALh7CRPXi-hJBkOr6nr7V8UNkLSDJJiRFkxOyNbe1fNJHkByZs0ZOn4--GFVJheoDnDHdMxxMy_tkveVKhxie4yxthmIiUcvP_y0hM_4UUAXFLvJkXjQuO0lt-fBGqvw0YtWjB5GIf9epJQ-s2mpCC11vd_s7TJ7m2oW_5GVcdcaxM9K-n24dyKfK8Dlmgep8rNUc%3D)
We’re going to be hearing a lot about the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and Supreme Court packing from the Left side of the aisle no matter who is inaugurated in January.

Those proposals are nothing short of radical and they threaten the strength of our middle class, our ongoing economic recovery, and our system of checks and balances.

In other words, America will be fundamentally changed if their liberal agenda ever sees the light of day – and it’s going to take all of us working together to make sure that never happens.

**[If you would like to be a part of standing up to the Left’s liberal agenda and want to move America in the right direction, click here to join our Conservative Values Defense Fund.>>>](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=e894a72de0f546caafbac17f5a4e599b&_e=1kNEHOlOFk0tLA77mcSJ8oADAhrTYrYLZbiTsPcG7bdB0vv6PDmd_JysdpzHay2RMgv4B6pxqknugpPGU5unbjqHcyRjYMyqX8kiJ6kPJRNqoazGUOV74E9LS-3Xt1NAoxxOKtNz3D-wnF02aw0zS8JrrD_43GnkraOWoK3yz9FD2InBAgZNnSi247O-5aRlXfT2bp6IL70tSyc3C70CRU0trd-GoVdX6EBq5mbF_guKixa57yG3XdJoKRx40L5ZYOUahBWeQs4-_6ws3-sqGg86M5htxq6h8fSTXv2gv7Cf4JcRY2q1rsJwpyTearGtVYxU9M4VuL7r6pL4TlyJZFLL3gVFWRcYnt0_7BdJ4kCUhVdzqr1MPc-TvkJ9YAv7oPmpShPorHxHuW-RkW1g3dDCJ7tSxL7R3sNcVa9bzZXUjCJNwBglvNX0jcB_kzV0MVproSnp0HVSklcPPuayUyFCRdZnAVkUIOJs9Zu4tuA%3D)**

[_**We’re accepting contributions to our new fund until midnight on November 30th.**_](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=e894a72de0f546caafbac17f5a4e599b&_e=1kNEHOlOFk0tLA77mcSJ8oADAhrTYrYLZbiTsPcG7bdB0vv6PDmd_JysdpzHay2RMgv4B6pxqknugpPGU5unbjqHcyRjYMyqX8kiJ6kPJRNqoazGUOV74E9LS-3Xt1NAoxxOKtNz3D-wnF02aw0zS8JrrD_43GnkraOWoK3yz9FD2InBAgZNnSi247O-5aRlXfT2bp6IL70tSyc3C70CRU0trd-GoVdX6EBq5mbF_guKixa57yG3XdJoKRx40L5ZYOUahBWeQs4-_6ws3-sqGq77SK6LfLnudePZKdCxbcaK0_IJoHesKamVmC2l_-TFEKpJx9Ocv-eBJptyl-VMTDG1gPG2bCOOjA78Dp9gy11gWmVGDEgxbeon787j8QCzh4zb6-1B1QQsIy2SY3n0uAmM3tbxmFumaDAXIjW11xntKsNAp-KyDECYuD9dr-wHJpTv6DKxyXVe9ItEhcKlKikOkD7pGMUWsZzEZw7o0cw%3D)

Thank you,
Darin LaHood

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=3951c3f2a904b09cac0d61b0f9d9ec396ee0ea77731213281c21e8de8eabe8ce146c81a3a1f35cd7eb00a2d3c51d74a6a0a28f7cc3e09919

Friend,
